parameters.content:
## L.1 P1 Loss Router
Translated from GHL workflow 6dfb7300-ee83-46df-b469-514d18274ea1.
GHL triggers: inbound_webhook:Inbound Agentic Trigger; contact_tag:reroute-loss; opportunity_status_changed:Lost in P1

Entry is a webhook (orchestrator-driven). Credentials by ID only; brand law applied to email senders (Randy Reece). See workflow node notes for [STUB] items.
Flags: 6 | Stubs: 8 | Brand-law: 0
